name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
fix(ci): force Pages rebuild after bot-authored manifest commits

GITHUB_TOKEN-authenticated pushes don't trigger other workflows (GitHub's
anti-recursion protection), so update-plugin-manifest and
update-dev-manifest's git push to main never actually triggered docs.yml -
Pages just never rebuilt on its own. Confirmed live: manifest-dev.json had
the correct 0.0.10 entry committed on main but the site kept serving the
empty seed content.

Both jobs now explicitly dispatch docs.yml via the REST API after pushing,
which isn't subject to the same suppression since it's an explicit call
rather than a passive push event.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
